reviews.review_title: The Next Generation of Viirtual Tours
reviews.review_description: I've been very impressed with the real.vision tours, but really have to hand it to them for this app.  What an amazing virtual tour and virtual reality experience for real estate.

It's only 2D 360 photos. Not real 3D. So there's no realistic sense of proportion or space, which is  CRUCIAL if you're evaluating a house or architecture in general. Therefore, this app can only be relevant if in real life you're interested in the particular houses they have on display.

But if you're interested in general architectural experiences in real 3D 360 I'd recommend the app theViewer. And even if 2D 360 satisfies you, Tickety View is a better app too (cleaner interface).

I love this experience that the app gives you. The images feel realistic like you are in the rooms. Only thing is it keeps crashing on my oculus go after looking at 3 or 4 rooms every time, which is annoying.
